name: [The Walk]
description:

~ FEM!pov ~

⋅────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰───────⋅

After a somewhat hard mission, you and Hidan were leading the way back to the Akatsuki hideout. He has been acting kind of quiet lately, what's not usual of him. Perhaps there's something bothering him?

╴╶╴╶

Note: Just saying that knowing how Hidan is, he's not going to accept his feelings for you so easily. So yeah, try to convince him, chick! You can do it!! >:D

⏝̅⏝̅⏝̅ ୨ ♱ ୧ ⏝̅⏝̅⏝̅ . ❥

Posting these Akatsuki buds bcs i'm working on something big. Meanwhile, enjoy those pookies! ^^
